since_last: 45% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.60%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.06% · BTC -1.63% · Gold -2.41% · Nasdaq100 -1.55%. 45% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.60%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.60%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.69%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -12.79%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +6.37%, HON +6.31%, SKHY +6.27%, FIX +4.34%, GEV +3.81%. Laggards: TSLA -12.79%, GOOGL -6.81%, AMZN -4.31%, UPST -4.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.13% at $112.8
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
